description: Manages SQLite database connections, transactions, and schema initialization.

classes.name: DatabaseConnection
classes.docstring:
Manages SQLite database connections, transactions, and schema initialization.

    This class uses a Settings object to configure the database connection,
    following the single-source-of-truth principle.

methods.name: __init__
methods.docstring:
Initializes the database connection manager.

        Args:
            db_path (Path): Path to the SQLite database file.
            settings (Settings): The application's settings object.
            logger (StructuredLogger): Logger for recording database events.

methods.name: _connect
methods.docstring:
Establishes a connection to the SQLite database using configuration from Settings.

        Raises:
            DatabaseError: If the connection fails.

methods.name: transaction
methods.docstring: Context manager for handling database transactions with thread-safe locking.

methods.name: init_db
methods.docstring: Initializes the database schema, creating all necessary tables and indexes.

methods.name: connection
methods.docstring: Provides access to the raw connection for repository classes.
